description_long: This is a single-serving cup of Bohunka brand strawberry-flavored dairy snack, featuring a tapered cylindrical shape with a wider top and a sealed foil lid. The lid is decorated with a large, vibrant image of strawberries and contains prominent branding and product information in Czech. The cup itself is primarily white with black and red text, and includes detailed illustrations of a rural house and strawberries, reinforcing the product's flavor and artisanal appeal. Nutritional and ingredient information is printed on the side in small text, along with a barcode and additional branding elements. The packaging appears to be made of plastic with a foil seal, typical for yogurt or similar dairy snacks. The overall design is clean, with a focus on natural imagery and clear product identification.
description: A white plastic cup with a foil lid, decorated with strawberry graphics and Bohunka branding, containing a strawberry-flavored dairy snack. The cup features rural illustrations and detailed product information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Bohunka logo, large strawberry image on the lid, and rural house illustration on the cup.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the strawberry image on the lid, partial product name, and more of the rural house illustration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying nutritional and ingredient information in small text, with less visible branding and graphics.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the Bohunka logo, barcode, and a clear view of the rural house illustration.
attribute_brand_logo: A blue and white rectangular logo with the text 'BOHUSOVICKA MLEKARNA 1901' is visible on the lid and side of the cup.
attribute_flavor_indication: Large strawberry graphics and the text 's jahodami' (with strawberries) on the lid and cup indicate strawberry flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional and ingredient information is visible on the side of the cup in small text.
